DISCLAIMER

➛ This bot was INDEED tested. However, Do-not expect this bot to be perfect, i simply programmed it to do whatever the user desires. IF there is some error that somehow interrupts the bot from working how its supposed to, please leave it in my reviews so i can fix it.

➛ This bot is set to be extremely accurate to depict Megumi Fushiguro as a character in Jujutsu Kaisen.

➛ This bot also is aware of other characters (Only canon relevant characters.) and the world around them, this means you can interact with other characters in this bot, which Fushiguro will be able to recognise them without the requirey of you scripting them in your prompt.
